title: Void dimension
description: A new dimension, which is hidden under the layer of bedrock
body:
# Warning

Install Sodium to avoid fps drops, especially when using more than 16 chunks

# Reason to go to the dimension

The main reason to go to the void is to get void armor, which is stronger than the netherite armor.

# Entering the dimension

TIP: All recipes are located in gallery of the mod

Recommended armor to enter the dimension is netherite. The dimension is not a cakewalk, so it is recommended to have some basic pvp skills.
Be careful, you need to light up your path, otherwise you will die due to corruption of the void

1. Get 2 or more voidiums, which are mined from deepslate void shard ore and the ore is found in the pale garden on height lower than 12.
2. Craft a cross or a prayer rope.
3. Brew void salvation potion, which allows to teleport in the void. The main ingredient of the potion is void shard and the potion is based on the awkward potion.
4. Craft a bedrock bomb by putting in the middle the void shard and surround by 8 tnts. The bomb can break any block in the game. 
5. Find the lowest point in the overworld.
6. Place the bedrock bomb on the bedrock and lit it like a tnt.
7. Drink void salvation potion.
8. Pray using a cross or a prayer rope by holding mouse 2.
9. Jump in the void.

# Exiting from the dimension to the overworld

1. Brew void salvation potion.
2. Craft a bedrock bomb (THIS IS A VERY IMPORTANT STEP, OTHERWISE YOU WILL BE SOFTLOCKED IN THE NETHER)
3. Find the hole in the void dimension.
4. Use a cross or a prayer rope and drink void salvation potion.
5. Jump in the hole.
6. When you teleport to the nether, place the bedrock bomb and lit it.
7. Escape the nether to the overworld.

# Upgrading netherite to void

1. Find 2 void shards.
2. Craft or find netherite smithing template.
3. Craft void smithing template.
4. Smelt void shard to void ingot.
5. Put the netherite tool, void ingot and void smithing template in the smithing table.

# Sources
